value.rationale: The page describes the Evals API eval run response object, which includes a `report_url` field linking to the evaluation report in the OpenAI dashboard. This substantiates that OpenAI provides report_url as part of its eval run output. However, the page notes the Evals platform is being deprecated (read-only Oct 31, 2026, shut down Nov 30, 2026), so the lifecycle is deprecated.
